rationale: This candidate provides the most natural and modern German translation while maintaining the technical context. It correctly translates 'Staff Engineers' (a specific role) rather than 'Senior-Entwickler' used in other versions. It also maintains the MDX structure perfectly and uses a consistent tone (Du-Form) which fits the blog style. The 'current' version was also good, but this candidate feels slightly more polished in its phrasing of technical concepts like 'Data-Layer-Code' and 'Lookups'.
